description_zh: 毛发明显打结/油腻的长毛猫,需识别毛发问题
description_en: Long-hair cat with visibly matted/greasy fur — should flag fur issue

expectations.rationale: matting → fur score should drop below 75
fur condition must reference the visible matting
fur issue shouldn't drag eye score down

qualitative_criteria_zh: 毛发问题必须具体描述(打结/油腻/局部 vs 整体),不能笼统说'毛发不太好'
建议项中应该包含梳毛或修毛的实际操作,不只是'多注意'
和上次记录(30 天前略需梳理)对比,语气应该体现'变差'
qualitative_criteria_en: Fur issue must be specific (matting? greasy? localised?), not generic 'fur not great'
Suggestions must include concrete brushing/grooming, not vague 'pay attention'
Should reference the 30-day-ago history showing this is worsening
